See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 6757 => 'Digicel', 67575 => 'bmobile', 67576 => 'bmobile', 67577 => 'bmobile', 67578 => 'bmobile', 67581 => 'Vodafone', 67582 => 'Vodafone', 67583 => 'Vodafone', 67588 => 'Digicel', ];
